discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Reported result (n = 54 combined cohort) and model result (n = 54 samples) match exactly (0% relative difference), well within the +/-10% concordance threshold. The combined validation cohort for the methylation clustering analysis in Supplementary Figure 1d is composed of Toronto (16) + TCGA (5) + DKFZ (33) = 54 samples.
